title: PRD: Usage-based billing tiers
text:
# PRD — Usage-based billing tiers
Product area: Billing
Status: Not started
Author: Product team

## Problem
Customers repeatedly request usage-based billing tiers. This appears in support tickets and NPS feedback for the Billing area.

## Proposed solution
Implement usage-based billing tiers with configuration in workspace settings.

## Success metrics
Reduce Billing-related complaints by 30%; adoption > 40% in 60 days.

## Priority
Backlog — not yet prioritized.
